{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203164883F1EF64866781DB021B"}"},"total":1446},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7578165255040156440","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看，就喜欢这几个男主对女主的拉扯暧昧感，以及撬朋友墙角的伪道德，字里行间间都是。满满的爽感，但我没想到，我又看到了一本连载文[哭][哭]作者我要饭饭"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1764431384,"group_id":"7556835359481416729","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"别听世俗的耳语，去看自己喜欢的风景","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nxq+qwejlISDt0JrPLyXNMvUGMQnpyUuR81QHQ25hmee","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/0aa30fa0338f45538ff23caaf8451eae~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776710278&x-signature=z5j7rFxlGj9ERj3hqq96F7golPE%3D","user_id":"3030699977750814","user_name":"应酒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3030699977750814","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1748615750,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#FFFFFF","can_worn":false,"id":17,"name":"击穿次元","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/47c082300352c1a9e6e7669d207df6fb","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/57235e9992067573933a8f743e5f9044"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7556835359481416729","book_info":{"abstract":"【架空+财阀+多男主f4+心机上位+大明星+全员沦陷+修罗场】
小说中，读者们厌倦了小白花女主，嫌弃她是一无是处只会惹是生非的菟丝花。
“这种肤浅的人设，看到就烦！”
他们渴望看到的是：财阀大小姐享受随意横行的特权以及权势滔天的财阀继承者们极致的偏爱。
-
温青釉穿进贵族学院时，顶着注定惨死的剧情。
她是明艳财阀大小姐的陪衬，是F4随手能碾碎的贫困特招生，因妄图勾引上位而被钉在耻辱柱上。
可这次——
只手遮天、冷漠霸道的学生会会长赫连决掐着她下巴轻笑，“想爬我的床？给你机会，过来。”
清冷倨傲的医疗巨头继承人肖想着弟弟的女朋友阴湿觊觎，“我们长得一样，要不要试试其他地方是不是也一样？”
绅士疏离的腹黑恶魔卡洛斯擦枪走火，“你值得我打破不对女人动手的原则，抢过来，关起来才乖。”
高岭之花校草慕容宸盯上了比自己的作品还要完美的存在，“宝宝，今天画这个姿势好不好？”
——
小白花脆弱，得很多人呵护才行。
温青釉被捧着在聚光灯下享受万千宠爱。
-心机小白花娇软训狗指南
-劝兄弟醒醒结果把自己也搭进去
-下位者谋生，上位者谋爱
-玛丽苏预警！男主全洁。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/c33d11a793b8906e24a55a651a1a068d","author":"吃个甜菜","author_id":"","book_id":"7556835359481416729","book_name":"贵族学院：心机小白花抢走了F4","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0d0d0","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":267,"name":"现言脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=267&name=现言脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":30,"name":"宠妻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=30&name=宠妻&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":4,"name":"校园","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=4&name=校园&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":486,"name":"明星","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=486&name=明星&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7556835366804668953","read_count":"107537","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"415648"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"168","tags":"现言脑洞,现代言情,校园,宠妻,腹黑,明星","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ba958f5af7282ae6dabb76e92f0208da~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779304608&x-signature=ePJGfniPqZ61rKlwE1spnkn2gps%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"134594215032195","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"56"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203164883F1EF64866781DB021B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":55,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration"
